title: Rats 'n' Greens
description: A mod with rats and broccoli.
body:
The mod has a Hungarian and an English version so watch out!
In the mod you can find:

-2 structure

-a lots of items

-1 mob

-some blocks

-1 villager profession

 

The structure is a supermarket with a lots of things like eye of ender, golden apples, all flowers, and a lot more.

In the stucture you can find one of te cutest things ever, some blocky rats, they eat broccoli.

you can find broccoli in forests and plains.

Thank you Gabee zun for playing my mod in your video!
